name: MSI MAG B560M MORTAR Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Supports DDR4-5066(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.0b - Realtek 2.5G LAN (B560MMO)
shortName: MSI MAG B560M MORTAR Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200
description: Micro ATX Intel B560 motherboard for LGA 1200 CPUs with PCIe 4.0 and DDR4-5066 support.
